mapper.select: SELECT a.*, p.name as project_name, e.name as creator_name, jc.name as job_category_name, r.role_name as role_name, c.name as category_name FROM tb_account a LEFT JOIN tb_project p ON a.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tb_employee e ON a.creator_id = e.id LEFT JOIN tb_job_category jc ON a.job_category_id = jc.id LEFT JOIN tb_role r ON a.role_id = r.id LEFT JOIN tb_category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT a.*, p.name as project_name, e.name as creator_name, jc.name as job_category_name, r.role_name as role_name, c.name as category_name FROM tb_account a LEFT JOIN tb_project p ON a.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tb_employee e ON a.creator_id = e.id LEFT JOIN tb_job_category jc ON a.job_category_id = jc.id LEFT JOIN tb_role r ON a.role_id = r.id LEFT JOIN tb_category c ON a.category_id = c.id ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.*, p.name as project_name, e.name as creator_name, jc.name as job_category_name, r.role_name as role_name, c.name as category_name FROM tb_account a LEFT JOIN tb_project p ON a.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tb_employee e ON a.creator_id = e.id LEFT JOIN tb_job_category jc ON a.job_category_id = jc.id LEFT JOIN tb_role r ON a.role_id = r.id LEFT JOIN tb_category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.creator_id = #{creatorId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_account WHERE status = 1 AND approval_stage = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_account WHERE status = 1 AND approval_stage = 2
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_account (project_id, creator_id, job_category_id, role_id, type, category_id, invoice_no, status, company_name, approval_progress_id, amount, remark, invoice_images, approval_stage, approved_by_finance, final_approver_id) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{creatorId}, #{jobCategoryId}, #{roleId}, #{type}, #{categoryId}, #{invoiceNo}, #{status}, #{companyName}, #{approvalProgressId}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{invoiceImages}, #{approvalStage}, #{approvedByFinance}, #{finalApproverId})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_account SET project_id = #{projectId}, type = #{type}, category_id = #{categoryId}, invoice_no = #{invoiceNo}, amount = #{amount}, remark = #{remark}, invoice_images = #{invoiceImages}, approval_stage = #{approvalStage}, approved_by_finance = #{approvedByFinance}, final_approver_id = #{finalApproverId} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_account SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
